seoTitle: Pine Clump vs Pine Grove — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pine Clump and Pine Grove. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pine Clump vs Pine Grove: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pine Clump and Pine Grove.
heading: Pine Clump vs Pine Grove — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pine Clump, New South Wales and Pine Grove, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pine Grove has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Pine Clump (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pine Clump or Pine Grove safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pine Clump has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Pine Grove scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pine Clump scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Pine Grove scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pine Clump or Pine Grove?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pine Grove has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
